scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis meilisearch

overrides.//: Security pins for transitive deps we don't declare directly. Drop each once the parent ships a release that already requires the fixed version. multer arrives via @nestjs/platform-express and handles every upload we accept (GHSA-72gw-mp4g-v24j, DoS). form-data arrives via axios and builds our outbound multipart requests (GHSA-hmw2-7cc7-3qxx, CRLF injection).
